creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Oleksandr Ignatyev from comment #2)
Thanks for explanation.
You can use patch to disable tests or you can use TESTING_UNSAFE (https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/Mk/Features/testing.mk#n7).

Newer version: you don't need open a new PR (please, don't), you can update this (overwrite the title).
